ctx: the API reads a tickets given its id
why: Any authenticated user can read someone else's tickets by changing the id — the ownership check is missing.
fixWhy: Verify the resource belongs to the caller (BOLA = #1 API risk).

ctx: an endpoint returns a invoices by id
why: Any authenticated user can read someone else's invoices by changing the id — the ownership check is missing.
fixWhy: Verify the resource belongs to the caller (BOLA = #1 API risk).
